summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Pegging/Earmarking feature (Sub-fase 1.7). All backend APIs, frontend UI components, owner-scoped guards, and anti-rebutan allocation logic verified. Regression tests for allocation policy and mixed-lot confirmation also passed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory/rolls/{roll_id}/earmark - earmarks roll to customer (200)
Backend: GET /api/pegging/rolls - lists all earmarked rolls (200)
Backend: Owner-scoped D3 guard - returns 409 for cross-entity pegging
Backend: Status guard - returns 409 for non-available roll pegging
Backend: Anti-rebutan logic - roll excluded for other customers, included for same customer (test_pegging_17.py: 12/12)
Frontend: Login and navigation to WMS -> Stok -> Rolls tab
Frontend: Rolls table displays with Pegging column
Frontend: Pegging filter bar with count (data-testid=rolls-pegging-bar, pegging-count)
Frontend: Peg button on available, non-pegged rolls (data-testid=roll-peg-btn-{rollId})
Frontend: PeggingModal opens with customer dropdown, note input, confirm button
Frontend: Owner-scoped customer dropdown filters customers by roll's entity
Frontend: Earmark confirmation creates purple badge (data-testid=roll-earmark-badge-{rollId})
Frontend: Pegging count increments after earmark
Frontend: Pegging filter toggle (data-testid=pegging-only-toggle) filters to only pegged rolls
